briefdescription.para: MainWindow::MainWindow handles all of the main functionality and also the main window.
Restore window geometry and state from saved settings.
Open the GPG key generation dialog.

parameterdescription.para: Parent dialog to return to after generation.

briefdescription.para: Open the user/recipient management dialog.

parameterdescription.para: Directory for which to manage recipients.

briefdescription.para: Open the configuration dialog.
Enable or disable the main UI elements.

detaileddescription.para: MainWindow::setUiElementsEnabled enable or disable the relevant UI elements.

parameterdescription.para: true to enable, false to disable.

memberdef.argsstring: (const QString &text, const bool isError, const bool isHtml=false)
memberdef.name: flashText

briefdescription.para: Display a transient message in the text panel.

parameterdescription.para: true to style the message as an error.
true if text contains HTML markup.

briefdescription.para: Return the currently selected index in the tree view.
Return the active key generation dialog, if any.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the keygen QDialog, or nullptr.

briefdescription.para: Destroy and clear the key generation dialog.
MainWindow::closeEvent hide or quit.
MainWindow::keyPressEvent did anyone press return, enter or escape?
MainWindow::changeEvent sets focus to the search box.
MainWindow::eventFilter filter out some events and focus the treeview.
Clear the current tree view selection.

detaileddescription.para: MainWindow::deselect clear the selection, password and copy buffer.

briefdescription.para: Handle an incoming inter-process message (single-instance mode).

detaileddescription.para: MainWindow::messageAvailable we have some text/message/search to do.

parameterdescription.para: Message string received from another instance.

briefdescription.para: Display a critical error dialog.
Slot called when an external process wrapper has started.
Show a message in the status bar for the given duration.

parameterdescription.para: time for which msg shall be visible

briefdescription.para: Handle output from the pass show command.
Handle output from the pass OTP command.
Handle results from a completed grep search.

parameterdescription.para: List of file/match pairs from the grep operation.

briefdescription.para: Trigger a git push operation.
Handle a click on an item in the tree view.

detaileddescription.para: MainWindow::on_treeView_clicked read the selected password file.

parameterdescription.para: The model index that was clicked.

briefdescription.para: Begin a re-encryption pass on the current path.

detaileddescription.para: MainWindow::startReencryptPath disable ui elements and treeview.

briefdescription.para: Finish a re-encryption pass on the current path.
Toggle grep (content search) mode.
Navigate to the password entry when a grep result is clicked.
MainWindow::addPassword add a new password by showing a number of dialogs.
MainWindow::addFolder add a new folder to store passwords in.
MainWindow::onEdit try and edit (selected) password.
MainWindow::onDelete remove password, if you are sure.
MainWindow::onOTP try and generate (selected) OTP code.
MainWindow::onUpdate do a git pull.
MainWindow::onUsers edit users for the current folder, gets lists and opens UserDialog.
MainWindow::on_configButton_clicked run Mainwindow::config.
MainWindow::on_treeView_doubleClicked when doubleclicked on TreeViewItem, open the edit Window.
MainWindow::clearPanel hide the information from shoulder surfers.
Executes when the string in the search box changes, collapses the TreeView.
MainWindow::on_lineEdit_returnPressed get searching.

detaileddescription.para: Select the first possible file in the tree

briefdescription.para: MainWindow::on_profileBox_currentIndexChanged make sure we show the correct "profile".

detaileddescription.para:
name
Handles changes to the selected profile in the profile combo box.

Ignores the event during a fresh start or when the selected profile matches the current profile. Otherwise, it clears the password field, updates the active profile and related settings, refreshes the environment, and resets the tree view and action states to reflect the newly selected profile.

simplesect.para: void - This function does not return a value.

briefdescription.para: MainWindow::showContextMenu show us the (file or folder) context menu.
MainWindow::showBrowserContextMenu show us the context menu in password window.
MainWindow::openFolder open the folder in the default file manager.
MainWindow::renameFolder rename an existing folder.
MainWindow::editPassword read password and open edit window via MainWindow::onEdit().
MainWindow::renamePassword rename an existing password.

MainWindow::focusInput selects any text (if applicable) in the search box and sets focus to it. Allows for easy searching, called at application start and when receiving empty message in MainWindow::messageAvailable when compiled with SINGLE_APP=1 (default).
MainWindow::onTimeoutSearch Fired when search is finished or too much time from two keypresses is elapsed.
MainWindow::initToolBarButtons init main ToolBar and connect actions.
MainWindow::initStatusBar init statusBar with default message and logo.
MainWindow::selectFirstFile select the first possible file in the tree.
MainWindow::firstFile return location of first possible file.
MainWindow::getFile get the selected file path.
MainWindow::setPassword open passworddialog.
MainWindow::updateProfileBox update the list of profiles, optionally select a more appropriate one to view too.
MainWindow::initTrayIcon show a nice tray icon on systems that support it.
MainWindow::destroyTrayIcon remove that pesky tray icon.
MainWindow::clearTemplateWidgets empty the template widget fields in the UI.
MainWindow::reencryptPath re-encrypt all passwords in a directory.
MainWindow::addToGridLayout add a field to the template grid.
MainWindow::config pops up the configuration screen and handles all inter-window communication.
Main application window orchestrating UI, user interactions, and external process handlers.

detaileddescription.para: Provides the central interface for managing items, folders, passwords, and OTPs; coordinates UI components (toolbars, panels, dialogs, status/tray), selection and navigation in the underlying file/store models, and lifecycle interactions with external handlers (e.g., pass, Git, GPG key generation, OTP).
